mentions.note: Coming back real good of late. CEO Farley is terrific; company starting to chug along. Going higher. Not kidding.
Dividend yield makes it more appealing than Microsoft at current valuations. Old-school value play Cramer prefers in tech downturn.
Very hard to own with warranty problems, rates stuck higher, and war headwinds on discretionary spending; pass on this name.
Caller's position flat for 6 years, recently up on EV/data center news; Cramer approves of parabolic trim strategy (20% off top); perfect way to lock gains without becoming a loser.

Ford Energy battery storage subsidiary transforms EV losses into 20+ GW annual capacity data center power supply by late 2027; first positive recommendation in years now justified by lower oil/rate environment; trades 8x earnings, 4.3% dividend.
